title: orthochilus monticola
intro: Orthochilus monticola, also known as the mountain orchid or mountain lip orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. It is native to tropical Africa, where its leaves and roots are used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties. The plant is said to have antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Orthochilus monticola include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including respiratory problems and digestive issues.
